checks.name: legacy_name removed; name present
checks.command: python3 -c "import json; d = json.load(open('config.json')); assert 'legacy_name' not in d and 'name' in d"

checks.name: legacy_timeout_seconds removed; timeout_seconds present
checks.command: python3 -c "import json; d = json.load(open('config.json')); assert 'legacy_timeout_seconds' not in d and 'timeout_seconds' in d"
